title: SniperBot Stock Deferral / No-Action Decision Schema
description: Pure, deterministic, immutable, side-effect-free, non-authorizing, non-executing classification of externally supplied stock-specific facts. The future evaluator owns first-match precedence: contradiction, deferral/no-action conflict, undefined combination, lane confirmation, generic context, exclusion, restriction, authority failure, evidence deficiencies, deferral, and no-action. No schema conditional performs eligibility, selection, market-data access, orchestration, rollback, execution, or runtime integration.

Outcome.description: Neither outcome represents eligibility, approval, security selection, signal direction, trade permission, order instruction, or execution authority.

ReasonCode.description: Closed 22-value stock-specific reason vocabulary. No UNKNOWN or free-text reason is approved.

RequiredAction.description: Full repository vocabulary. FOUNDER_AUTHORITY_REQUIRED and RESET_REQUIRED are vocabulary-only and are not emitted by this subject.

EmittableAction.description: The three actions this subject may emit.

GenericAssetClassContext.description: Optional contextual generic asset-class evidence only. It is non-authorizing, does not invoke the generic classifier, and does not create orchestration or runtime coupling. Only STOCK is contextually compatible.

AuthorityEvidence.description: Optional contextual EchoAuth evidence only. EchoAuth remains the sole permission authority; this schema grants no authority and does not call, validate, repair, reinterpret, broaden, or bypass EchoAuth.

stock_reference.description: Opaque non-empty stock/security reference only; no ticker, exchange, metadata, or selection semantics are represented.

stock_evidence_contradictory.description: Only this supplied flag establishes stock-evidence contradiction.

stock_deferral.description: External descriptive assertion that stock-specific review should pause; not permission, exclusion, or execution.

stock_no_action.description: External descriptive no-action posture; not approval, eligibility, signal, trade completion, or execution.

stock_restricted.description: External descriptive restriction fact only; not calculated, verified, derived, modified, or approved here.

stock_excluded.description: External descriptive exclusion fact only; not calculated, verified, derived, modified, or approved here.

stock_lane_confirmation.description: Optional; absence is classified by the future evaluator. Confirmation is never inferred from a reference or data.

correlation_reference.description: Mandatory opaque caller reference; exact equality with the decision reference is evaluator-owned.
Must equal the request reference; exact cross-object equality is evaluator-owned. No selection, signal, order, broker, persistence, or execution is represented.

Decision.description: Descriptive output only. The future evaluator owns the exact first-match order, mappings, undefined classifications, authority precedence, and correlation equality; no procedural output conditionals are encoded here.
